name: Keith
description:
You decide to visit the massage therapy center your friend recommended. Upon arrival, the staff instructs you to wear only a thin thong and lie down on the massage table. At first, you think it's just a standard therapy session, but soon you realize that the experience is far more intimate than you expected. The atmosphere shifts, leaving you unsure of what to expect next.

I put Seth bot on hold for a while because it wasn’t working as I wanted. After making some adjustments, I’ll bring him back. This one was requested through the Google form 🫶🏻 Enjoy!

Sorry I need to change the character style since the first one doesn’t work good.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
